diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,146 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class, Context, HonoRequest type, client inference types, Env/Handler/Schema types
+- Internal names noticed: Hono import from './hono', type re-exports from './types', './context', './request', './client'
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports core classes and types for users
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports Hono class and types for Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, HTTPResponseError
+- Internal names noticed: NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError interface, ContentHandler, type definitions for environment and routing
+- Imports or neighbors: co-located with core module
+- Plain-English summary: Central type definitions for Hono's request/response handling and middleware patterns
+- Copy-safe detail: Interfaces and type definitions for HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Env, Input, Schema validation, type inference for request/response
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class extending HonoBase with router configuration
+- Internal names noticed: Hono constructor, router initialization with SmartRouter/RegExpRouter/TrieRouter, HonoOptions type
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Public Hono class that extends base with default smart router setup
+- Copy-safe detail: Class Hono extends HonoBase<E, S, BasePath> with optional HonoOptions, instantiates SmartRouter with fallback to RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase constructor, addRoute, onError, basePath, onNotFound, route method
+- Internal names noticed: errorHandler, handleReq, handleMatch, compose invocation, clone method, #handleError private method
+- Imports or neighbors: core base implementation file
+- Plain-English summary: Internal base class with routing logic, error handling, and request processing chain
+- Copy-safe detail: Const errorHandler function, onError method sets handler, clone method copies config, private #handleError catches errors, compose invoked with app.errorHandler and #notFoundHandler
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with req, res, var, json, text, html methods, set, get, newResponse
+- Internal names noticed: error property, finalized flag, FetchEvent extraction, ExecutionContext extraction
+- Imports or neighbors: co-located with core module
+- Plain-English summary: Request context object carrying request, response, variables, and utilities for rendering
+- Copy-safe detail: Context properties include req, res, finalized bool, error property, methods for headers, status, cookies, variables, rendering text/html/json
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with raw, body, headers, query, param, route
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol, body reading from raw, URLSearchParams usage
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request/constants, ./utils/body, ./http-exception
+- Plain-English summary: Typed HonoRequest wrapper around the native Request object with helper methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Class extends Request, throws HTTPException on direct raw body access after consumption, uses GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol constant
+- Internal names noticed: Symbol for routing match tracking
+- Imports or neighbors: None, standalone constants file
+- Plain-English summary: Singleton symbol constant used for internal routing match identification
+- Copy-safe detail: Export const GET_MATCH_RESULT as unique Symbol
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: Body parsing utilities typed for form and multipart data
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject type definitions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request for HonoRequest type
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript types for body parsing with dot notation and all-options support
+- Copy-safe detail: Type aliases for dot-notation parsing, all boolean options, component and object value types recursive
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function for middleware execution with error/not-found handlers
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch inner function, index tracking, context.error assignment, next callback
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Koa-style middlewares executor with dispatch pattern and error propagation
+- Copy-safe detail: Function takes middleware array, optional onError and onNotFound, returns (context, next) => Promise<Context>, dispatch tracks execution order and error state
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error with res and status properties, getResponse method
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions type, constructor defaults to 500 status, getResponse returns body and headers
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status for ContentfulStatusCode type
+- Plain-English summary: Exception class for authentication failures and fatal HTTP errors
+- Copy-safe detail: Class extends Error with res?: Response, status: ContentfulStatusCode, constructor takes status code, getResponse creates Response with body/headers or status/text
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType
+- Internal names noticed: hc export from './client', parseResponse and DetailedError from './utils', type exports from './types'
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client API entry point with type inference and request/response utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports hc function, parseResponse with DetailedError, types for InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function creating typed HTTP clients, Client interface
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl class, method path construction, fetch calls
+- Imports or neighbors: ./types, ./utils for buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, serialize from cookie
+- Plain-English summary: Client implementation with proxy-based API for defining request methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Creates proxy with createProxy callback, ClientRequestImpl stores url and method, uses buildSearchParams, deepMerge options, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse
+- Internal names noticed: DetailedError status types, response filtering by status code, ClientResponse type aliases
+- Imports or neighbors: co-located client module
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for client-side HTTP operations and request inference
+- Copy-safe detail: Types for Client function signature, Fetch type, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse with statusCode and statusText, DetailedError
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: isObject helper function, fetchRP import from fetch-result-please, DetailedError export
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please
+- Plain-English summary: URL and param manipulation utilities plus JSON parse helper for client
+- Copy-safe detail: export mergePath string concatenation, replaceUrlParam regex substitution, buildSearchParams URLSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol ws/http swap, removeIndexString regex, deepMerge recursive object merge, parseResponse async wrapper for fetchRP
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class, json content-type detection
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses set, detectResponseType function, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: standalone client utility file
+- Plain-English summary: Minimalized ofetch with smart response body detection and error throwing
+- Copy-safe detail: Set nullBodyResponses with 101,204,205,304, detectResponseType checks content-type header for json, DetailedError extends Error with detail/code/statusCode/log properties, fetchRP awaits fetchRes, extracts body by type, checks ok and throws DetailedError if not
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function for service worker registration, handle export
+- Internal names noticed: addEventListener call with fetch, handle function invocation
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service worker adapter that registers Hono app via addEventListener('fetch')
+- Copy-safe detail: Takes Hono app and HandleOptions, sets up addEventListener('fetch', handle(app, options)), handles fetch events in service worker context
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function converting Hono app to FetchEvent handler
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent type reference, opts.fetch fallback for 404, globalThis.fetch binding
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./types for FetchEvent
+- Plain-English status detail: Returns Handler function wrapping app.fetch in async/await, binds to fetch from globalThis, opts.fetch fallback on 404 status, uses evt.respondWith for response
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface with clientId, request, respondWith, waitUntil
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent interface, preloadResponse property, resultingClientId
+- Imports or neighbors: standalone types file for service worker
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript interfaces for FetchEvent in service worker adapter
+- Copy-safe detail: ExtendableEvent with waitUntil method, FetchEvent with clientId string, handled Promise, preloadResponse Promise, request Request, resultingClientId string, respondWith(R|PromiseLike<R>) method
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
